claim: Behavior rule: In similar future work, apply this decision: Improved the DinoBrain Observatory dinosaur graph candidate after user feedback that the previous deployed visual felt disappointing. Kept changes visual-only: increased graph canvas height, added aspect-preserving dino frame mapping, redistributed root/category nodes into head/neck/tail/leg roles, strengthened pose lock, reduced edge physics, and added live-data scaffold routes. Updated design QA with v7 screenshots and marked the result as a review candidate rather than release-ready.
